mapper.sql: select id, rule_name, uid_type, root_type, uid_root, suffix_pattern, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from ndt_uid_rule
mapper.select: where uid_type = #{uidType} and enabled = '1' and del_flag = '0' order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_uid_rule (rule_name, uid_type, root_type, uid_root, suffix_pattern, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{ruleName}, #{uidType}, #{rootType}, #{uidRoot}, #{suffixPattern}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update ndt_uid_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, uid_type = #{uidType}, root_type = #{rootType}, uid_root = #{uidRoot}, suffix_pattern = #{suffixPattern}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
update ndt_uid_rule set enabled = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id != #{id} and uid_type = #{uidType} and enabled = '1' and del_flag = '0'
